title: Best Buy chooses Amazon's AWS for cloud services
text: Amazon.com Inc. AMZN, -5.47% announced Thursday that Best Buy Co. Inc. BBY, +0.01% has selected it to provide cloud services and talent development in cloud engineering. The announcement notes that Best Buy plans to hire 1,000 tech team staff members.

title: My Top 10 High Yield Dividend Stocks For February 2022

title: Best Buy Selects AWS as Its Strategic Cloud Provider
text: SEATTLE--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Today, Amazon Web Services, Inc. (AWS), an Amazon.com, Inc. company, (NASDAQ: AMZN), announced that Best Buy Co., Inc. (NASDAQ: BBY) has selected AWS as its preferred cloud provider for cloud infrastructure services and its strategic partner for developing cloud engineering talent.
